archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) - Warm Minimalist Premium Tech

typography.hero_overline: text-sm sm:text-base font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-orange-500
typography.hero_h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight text-stone-900
typography.hero_subtitle: text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-xl font-normal text-stone-500 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl

layout.spacing_philosophy: Generous spacing. Use py-24 for sections. Ample whitespace to let products breathe.

grid_system.product_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-x-8 gap-y-16

components.navbar: Sticky, glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-stone-50/80 border-b border-stone-200`), z-50. Include Logo, Search placeholder, Wishlist, Cart, Profile dropdown.
components.buttons: Rounded-full for premium feel. Primary: `bg-orange-500 text-white hover:bg-orange-600`. Secondary: `border border-stone-300 text-stone-900 hover:border-stone-500`.
components.product_card: Borderless. `aspect-[4/5]` image container with `bg-stone-100 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden`. Image scales on hover (`scale-105 transition-transform duration-500`). Text is left-aligned below the image. Title in `stone-900`, Price (₹249) in `stone-500`.
components.cart_drawer: Slide-out from right (use Shadcn Sheet). Minimalist layout, white background, subtotal calculation, sticky checkout button at the bottom.
components.trust_badges: Flex row, gap-4 to gap-8, small text (`text-xs` or `text-sm`), subtle gray icons. Positioned below hero buttons.

interactions.hover_effects: Use smooth transitions (`duration-300 ease-out`). Product cards should have a gentle lift and image slight scale on hover.
interactions.testing_requirements: All interactive elements MUST have descriptive `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='btn-add-to-cart-silicone-1'`, `data-testid='nav-cart-icon'`, `data-testid='checkout-form-submit'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building 'TrendCart'. Implement the exact Google Sign-in landing page structure that redirects to the main store after auth.
Include the navbar with Logo, Search input placeholder ('Search cases...'), Wishlist icon, Cart icon, and Profile/Sign-out dropdown. Links: Shop, Silicone, Transparent, About, Contact.

Hero Section MUST use the texts: Overline: 'Premium Cases | MagSafe Ready', Heading: 'Protection, refined.', Subtitle: 'Transparent Anti-Yellow, Silicone, and MagSafe cases engineered for every device. Minimal by design. Built to last.'
Hero MUST include two buttons: 'Shop the collection' (with arrow) and 'Our story'.
Trust badges MUST be present below hero: 'Anti-Yellow Coating', 'MagSafe Certified', 'Free Shipping ₹999+'.
Product cards MUST show images, title, ₹249 price, and an 'Add to Cart' button.
Implement a slide-out Cart Drawer with a live subtotal calculation.
Create a minimalist Checkout Page capturing Name, Phone, and Address. The final action is a 'Place Order via WhatsApp' button.
Ensure 'Outfit' (Headings) and 'Manrope' (Body) fonts are loaded via Google Fonts. Do NOT use Inter or Roboto.
Do NOT use dummy image placeholders (like via.placeholder.com). ONLY use the images provided in the media section of this JSON.
Strictly follow the color scheme: Off-white background (bg-stone-50), deep charcoal text (text-stone-900), warm orange (#F97316) primary accent.
